resource.name: NotUsed
resource.object: Item did not fit any criteria

resource.name: TooClose
resource.object: Item too close to previous item

resource.name: NoResultError
resource.object: No weight quality received from CWU

resource.name: NoBatchNoGate
resource.object: No batch, can't start new order

resource.name: RateNoGate
resource.object: Rate reject, can't start new order

resource.name: BlockedNoGate
resource.object: Batch blocked, can't start new order

resource.name: No drop due to remote stop
resource.object: No drop due to remote stop

resource.name: NotInSchema
resource.object: does not exist in the schema

resource.name: NotInDatabase
resource.object: does not exists in the database

resource.name: AlreadyInSchema
resource.object: is already defined in the schema

resource.name: InitError
resource.object: Error during initialization of remote connection.

resource.name: ChangePrgTest
resource.object: Change to test program. Might be because CW is not in the correct state

resource.name: ChangePrg
resource.object: Change to program {0}. Might be because CW is not in the correct state

resource.name: CreateProgramEcheck
resource.object: Create Echeck program {0} with {1} channels (Can't update active program)

resource.name: CreateProgramMin
resource.object: Create Minumum program {0} with {1} channels (Can't update active program)

resource.name: WarnR51
resource.object: If R51 mode weighing range must be atleast 75% and 125% of nominal

resource.name: IllegalWeights
resource.object: one or more of the weight limits.

resource.name: InvalidGates
resource.object: one or more of the output gates

resource.name: GTIN
resource.object: Global Trade Item Number (GTIN), EAN product number

resource.name: ContainedGTIN
resource.object: GTIN of trade items contained in a logistic unit

resource.name: DueDate
resource.object: Due Date for amount on payment slip. Date by which an invoice should be paid(YYMMDD)

resource.name: BestBeforeDate
resource.object: Best before date a.k.a. Sell By Date (YYMMDD). Product should be sold before this date.

resource.name: ExpirationDate
resource.object: Expiration date (YYMMDD). See also AI 15. Product should be used/consumed before this date.

resource.name: SecondaryHealthData
resource.object: Secondary Data For Specific Health Industry Products

resource.name: AdditionalProductId
resource.object: Additional Product Identification Assigned by The Manufacturer

resource.name: ProductNetKg
resource.object: Product net weight in kilos, 4th AI digit is decimal point position

resource.name: TradeItemCount
resource.object: Count of Trade Items Contained in a Logistic Unit

resource.name: AmountPayableVariable
resource.object: Amount Payable - with ISO currency code

resource.name: ShipToGln
resource.object: "Ship To - Deliver To" EAN/UCC Global Location Number (GLN)

resource.name: BillToGln
resource.object: "Bill To - Invoice To" EAN/UCC Global Location Number (GLN)

resource.name: ShipForGln
resource.object: "Ship For - Deliver For - Forward To" EAN/UCC Global Location Number

resource.name: PhysicalLocationGln
resource.object: Identification of a Physical Location, EAN/UCC Global Location Number (GLN)

resource.name: InvoicingPartyGln
resource.object: EAN/UCC Global Location Number of the Invoicing Party

resource.name: ProductionLocationGln
resource.object: EAN/UCC Global Location Number of the Production or Sercvice Location

resource.name: ShipToLocal
resource.object: "Ship To - Deliver To" Postal Code Within a Single Postal Authority

resource.name: ShipToCode
resource.object: "Ship To - Deliver To" Postal Code With 3 Digit ISO Country Code

resource.name: TradeItemOrigin
resource.object: Country of Origin of a Trade Item (3-Digit ISO Country Code)

resource.name: InitialProcessingCountry
resource.object: Country of initial processing (one or more 3-Digit ISO Country Code)

resource.name: ProcessingCountry
resource.object: Country of processing (3-Digit ISO Country Code)

resource.name: DisassemblyCountry
resource.object: Country of disassembly (3-Digit ISO Country Code)

resource.name: FullProcessChainCountry
resource.object: Country convering full process chain (3-Digit ISO Country Code)

resource.name: UNECEMeatCarcasses
resource.object: UN/ECE meat carcasses and cuts classification

resource.name: SlaughterHouse
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 0

resource.name: DeboningCuttingHallNr1
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 1

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr2
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 2

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr3
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 3

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr4
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 4

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr5
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 5

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr6
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 6

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr7
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 7

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr8
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 8

resource.name: ProcessingCuttonsHallNr9
resource.object: Number of processor with ISO Country Code 9

resource.name: RollProducs
resource.object: Roll Products - Width, Length, Core Diameter, Direction And Splices

resource.name: MobilePhoneEsi
resource.object: Electronic Serial Identifier (ESN) For Cellular Mobile Telephones (CMT)

resource.name: TradeItemComponentId
resource.object: Identification of the Component of a Trade Item

resource.name: CouponExNscOffer
resource.object: Coupon Extended Code - NSC + Offer Code

resource.name: CouponExNscOfferEnd
resource.object: Coupon Extended Code - NSC + Offer Code + End Of Offer Code

resource.name: MutuallyAgreed
resource.object: Information Mutually Agreed Between Trading Partners (Including FACT Data Identifiers)
